user.name: Rise Kujikawa
user.description:
rise quote bot
quotes taken from @mention, @mention, and @mention*

posts.text: And, during all that, I want to have a serious relationship with the man I love, and get married on a tropical island!
Hey, that was a pretty good hit!
I have to protect the smiles of the people who are precious to me.
It's true what they say... It takes all types to make a world.
Looking at these gym clothes makes me think of some of the old variety shows I watched when I was younger.
Geez, Senpai, you're a natural-born playboy sometimes.
The person everyone likes, the one they say “hi” to on the street? That’s not the real me.
Noooo probleeeem! It'll be over in a flash.
Four enemies left! Don't give up!
It's weak to light! Beat it, and move on!
Amazing, Yukiko-senpai! Two defeated so far!
Does this mean the game's starting!? Urgh, this kinda pisses me off! Let's go, Senpai!
We don't have to rush. But I want to find him quick. Let's give it everything we got, Senpai!
Teddieeee! Heeeey!
Oh, yeah. Want some tofu to take home?
When I got back to school after my debut, no one bullied me... I was happy at first, with people I didn't even know talking to me...
What…? I dealt all that exquisite pain and you’re still not satisfied? What a finicky guest...
Weird...? Like stalkers? Are you guys fans of mine?
A game...? Aren't you the one who thinks of this as a game?
*chuckle* I almost got killed by those monsters. Compared to that, exams are nothing.
*chuckle* I'm glad you're the first people I got to know here.
Why don’t I start by asking what kind of girl you like?
Grrr... If only I could detect people in the real world...
Ooooh, Senpai! That was perfect!
I'd be scared if you could. Some people are just like that, though...
Enemy defeated! You're off to a good start!
Rise and Kanami! Teaming up would be kind of unfair, huh?
Senpai... I'm not a nuisance to you, am I?
Oh, Senpai. If you’re free, let’s go play!
"Risette"? Who the hell is she? There's no such person in this world! I'm no one but myself! C'mon, look at me!
Go! Beat 'em up!
Do you go to Yasogami, like Senpai? I'll be starting school there tomorrow, so I hope we get along too.
Senpai, are you… happy right now? Do you like being with me… like this, the way we are now?
It's weak to ice! This'll be easy!
I never thought I'd be out in public like this.
Oh, uh, I just remembered. There was a question on the exam that I didn't get.
You'd be perfect as a butler. You're very dignified, and you hardly ever talk. Seriously, it totally suits you!
This spring, one young girl levels up to become a high school idol… Yayyyy!
I did tons of shoots there. It's just beyond the Moonlight Bridge, yeah?
Don't let me down, Senpai! Show me your skills!
Well, if a thing is worth doing, it’s worth doing all the way! I’m gonna bare it all for you!
If you ever have some time to kill, think of me, okay?
...Anyway, I'm through with it! I have nothing to do with showbiz and all that stuff now!
Thank you... very much. It's because of you and the others than I'm still alive... Heehee...
Hey, that was a pretty good hit!
Well, if that's what you want...
Goooood evening, everyone! I’m Risette!
...When I was at my parents' house, I was on my best behavior around them...
The way she explained it... Tofu looks weak and fragile, but it's actually pretty resilient.
We'll do our best tomorrow after we're recharged today. How does that sound?
There are three enemies! Don't get cocky!
I'm tired of diets! Enough with going to the gym! Good thing there's something that even I can handle!
What...? I have a bad feeling about this...
Wow, it's puny! This'll be cake.
It's weak to electricity! This'll be easy!
No, don't get scared! I'm with you!
Goooood evening, everyone! I'm Risette! Thanks for being such faithful viewers!
Does this mean the game's starting!? Urgh, this kinda pisses me off! Let's go, Senpai!
I have to protect the smiles of the people who are precious to me.
It’s true what they say… It takes all types to make a world.
When we were filming, a lot of times I came here instead of eating boxed lunches.
Gosh, I'm trying to remember the last time I went to Port Island and I wasn't working... *Chuckle* This'll be great!
I was alone the entire time...
All I was thinking about was you.
Oh, I see. I chose acetic acid... Duh, of course it couldn't have been vinegar.
*chuckle* I almost got killed by those monsters. Compared to that, exams are nothing.
Hey, where's Teddie?
Four of them! You need to thin 'em out!
What do I need to know English for!? I can always ask a translator!
Personally, I think Nanako would be a great asset to my band with her amazing recorder skills.
She just talks about tofu. She says... I'm like tofu. I had to ask her what that meant.
When we come back, you’ll get a good, long look at the real me! Maru-Q!
Umm, Senpai… I know you can do it! Show me one last time that you’re the coolest guy in the world!
The enemy's weakness is darkness! It's doomed!
It's weak to ice! This'll be easy!
I'm no longer a "personality"! My private time doesn't belong to a manager anymore!
I actually don’t really like handsome-looking guys. I mean, it’s what’s on the inside that really counts, right?
And you seem like the type of guy who knows all the cool spots in town.
Not good. There's not enough information to go on. But at least we're positive that someone's in there...
Enemy down! That's the way, Yosuke-senpai!
Oh, uh, I just remembered. There was a question on the exam that I didn't get.
I was tired yesterday, but I couldn't sleep. And it was raining, so I decided to try that rumor I'd heard about...
Make sure you take notice when I wear it, okay?
Grrr... If only I could detect people in the real world...
Huh? Senpai? Fancy meeting you here!
What!? Glasses with the summer uniform!? It looks even more mismatched...
Goooood evening, everyone! I’m Risette!
Now it's my turn to help you guys out, Senpai! Don't worry, just leave it to me!
Why're you buying another idol's photo?! Mine's in there too!
...Anyway, I'm through with it! I have nothing to do with showbiz and all that stuff now!
My sense of rhythm combined with the courage it takes to go onstage...Haha, I guess my idol experience counts for something, huh?
Haha! Enjoying yourself? I’ve got a ways to go until I show my true self… You ain’t seen nothin’ yet!
You really hit it hard!
Let’s talk about something fun. After all, I don’t want to waste the time we have together!
But still, I’m a little embarrassed… So I’m gonna turn out the lights!
You're with me right now because I'm Risette, yeah?
If you think I'm just an idol, you're in for trouble. I haven't trained for nothing!
Huh? Why? I thought you liked action movies, Chie-senpai.
